chat.generic_safe_failure: The AI assistant is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

composer.clarification: Please clarify your request a bit more.
composer.duplicate_goal: This goal was already recorded; I didn't create a duplicate. Goal "{title}" with amount {amount}{deadline} exists in your active goals.
composer.update_failed: The update was not confirmed in the database. Please try again.
composer.uncertain_fallback: I couldn't build a confident final response right now.
composer.general_fallback: Got it. To record or analyze finances, please provide the amount and subject in a bit more detail.
composer.rejected_destructive: The operation is invalid and was not executed for safety.
composer.rejected_history: This request was identified from conversation history and was not re-executed.
composer.rejected_goal: To give an accurate answer I need to check your recorded goals, but the database plan was incomplete. Please ask again.
composer.rejected_advice: To analyze this, your financial data is being reviewed. If you have a specific question — such as what was the top expense this month or how much budget is left — ask and I'll answer from real data.
composer.rejected_default: This operation was not compatible with database safety rules. If this is a regular financial request, please ask again with the same details.
composer.goal_created: Goal '{title}' with amount {amount} has been recorded{deadline}.
composer.goal_with_commitment: A related financial commitment was also recorded.
composer.commitment_created: Future commitment '{title}' for {amount}{due} has been recorded.
composer.tx_income_suggestion: If this income is recurring, we can factor it into your monthly plan later.
composer.tx_expense_suggestion: It's a good idea to take a quick look at this month's spending trend at the end of the week.
composer.select_both: In this period you recorded {expense} in expenses and {income} in income. Your recorded balance is {balance} {direction}.
composer.select_expense_only: In this period a total of {amount} in expenses was recorded.
composer.select_no_expense: No expenses were recorded for this period.
composer.select_income_only: Your income in this period totaled {amount}.
composer.select_no_income: No income was recorded for this period.
composer.select_top_category: The highest expense in this period was in category {name} with a total of {amount}.
composer.select_no_data: No expenses were recorded for this period.
composer.goals_no_active: No active financial goals are currently recorded for you.
composer.delete_no_match: I couldn't find a matching record to delete.
composer.delete_partial: {deleted} record(s) deleted; {missed} delete request(s) matched nothing.
composer.delete_ambiguous: Multiple records matched that description. To avoid deleting the wrong one, I did not delete anything. Please specify which one you meant.
composer.numeric_inconsistency: My numeric proposal did not add up against the amount available, so I'm holding off on a precise allocation to avoid giving you wrong numbers. If you tell me your available amount again, I'll work out a split that adds up correctly.
